descriptions.bg_mine: 个人中心页面背景，温暖餐厅柔光虚化光斑，暖橘琥珀色调，舒适用餐氛围
descriptions.banner_activity: 外卖优惠活动横幅，暖色系促销氛围，动态斜线构图，左侧留白放价格，食欲感强
descriptions.banner_cart_food: 购物车菜品缩略图，食物精致特写，干净明亮简洁，浅景深
descriptions.banner_food_thumb: 菜品缩略图卡片，精致美食摄影风格，暖色灯光，丰富的食材纹理细节
descriptions.banner_order_food: 订单确认页小图，食物精致呈现，柔光照明，简洁无干扰
descriptions.banner_promo: 外卖首页主视觉促销横幅，大尺寸美食图，动态构图，视觉冲击力强，上方留白放标题
descriptions.banner_shop_cover: 商家列表封面图，餐厅门面或招牌菜品展示，暖色灯光，诱人食欲
descriptions.banner_shop_header: 商家详情页头部大图，餐厅氛围全景，暖色环境光，专业食品摄影品质

btn_add.subject: a circular plus add button for food ordering, restaurant theme

btn_add_cart.subject: a circular plus add to cart button, food delivery app

btn_minus.subject: a circular minus remove button, food ordering interface

btn_plus.subject: a circular plus increase quantity button, food delivery app

icon_arrow_right.subject: a right pointing arrow chevron for navigation, thin elegant

icon_cart_empty.subject: an empty shopping cart icon for empty state illustration, relaxed mood

icon_cart_footer.subject: a shopping cart icon with bag, e-commerce food delivery style

icon_cat.subject: a food category entrance icon grid item, restaurant cuisine type

icon_empty.subject: an empty mailbox no data illustration icon for empty state page

icon_func.subject: a function menu entry icon, address coupon favorite management

icon_location.subject: a location map pin marker icon, delivery address navigation

icon_order_status.subject: an order status tracking icon, delivery progress indicator

icon_search.subject: a search magnifying glass icon, find food restaurants

icon_setting.subject: a settings gear cog icon, app preferences configuration

icon_shop.subject: a restaurant shop storefront icon, food business shop

icon_shop_small.subject: a small restaurant shop icon for inline display, simple storefront

icon_tab.subject: a tab bar navigation icon, bottom navigation bar element

icon_home.subject: a home tab bar icon for bottom navigation, house shop storefront

icon_menu.subject: a category menu browsing tab bar icon, grid squares layout

icon_cart.subject: a shopping cart tab bar icon for bottom navigation, e-commerce style

icon_mine.subject: a user profile person my account tab bar icon, human silhouette

icon_cat_drink.subject: 饮品饮料分类入口图标，奶茶果汁气泡水清凉夏日

icon_cat_cold.subject: 凉菜冷盘分类入口图标，拍黄瓜凉拌清爽开胃

icon_cat_bbq.subject: 烧烤烤肉分类入口图标，烤串烟火气美食

icon_cat_snack.subject: 小吃零食分类入口图标，炸鸡排章鱼烧煎饼果子

icon_pending.subject: 待付款订单状态图标，钱包支付时钟等待

icon_delivering.subject: 配送中外卖图标，骑手电动车快递送达

icon_completed.subject: 已完成订单图标，对勾打勾确认完成

icon_refund.subject: 退款售后图标，退款退货客服服务

icon_address.subject: 收货地址管理图标，定位地图导航标记

icon_coupon.subject: 优惠券图标，折扣券红包票券促销

icon_about.subject: 关于我们图标，信息简介品牌餐厅

icon_feedback.subject: 一键反馈图标，在线客服对话消息沟通
